input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.5.1
            TITLE: the shoulder harness mounting bar must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.5.1: The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar must:
F.6.5.1 The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar must: 
a. Be a single piece of uncut, continuous, closed section steel tubing that meets F.3.2.1.k 
b. Attach to the Main Hoop on both sides of the chassis

final_answer: rule F.6.5.1: The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar must: F.6.5.1 The Shoulder Harness Mounting Bar must: a. Be a single piece of uncut, continuous, closed section steel tubing that meets F.3.2.1.k b. Attach to the Main Hoop on both sides of the chassis
